content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://link.springer.com/content/pdf/10.1007/s13337-021-00703-5.pdf", "source_title": "Is there any role of intermittent fasting in the prevention and improving clinical outcomes of COVID-19?: intersection between inflammation, mTOR pathway, autophagy and calorie restriction", "source_type": "journal_article", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "The coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) pandemic is provoking a global public health crisis.", "direct_quote": "The coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) pandemic is provoking a global public health crisis.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Future prospective randomized controlled clinical trials to evaluate intermittent fasting (IF) regimens in order to prevent and treat...", "direct_quote": "Future prospective randomized controlled clinical trials to evaluate intermittent fasting (IF) regimens in order to prevent and treat moderate to severe forms of COVID-19 in humans are needed.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 2 facts from Is there any role of intermittent fasting in the prevention ."}]}
